---
title: "Rigid"
generated: true
description: "Rigid (rotation + translation) transform on `SE(2)` / `SE(3)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._model`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Rigid -->
```python
class Rigid
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:Rigid -->
Rigid (rotation + translation) transform on `SE(2)` / `SE(3)`.

The parameter vector is an axis-angle rotation followed by a
translation: in 2-D $(\theta, t_x, t_y)$ (3 entries) and in
3-D $(\omega_x, \omega_y, \omega_z, t_x, t_y, t_z)$
(6 entries). The exponential map is closed-form (Rodrigues' formula)
and GPU-native.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Rigid.n_params -->
```python
n_params(ndim: int) -> int
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Parameter count: one rotation angle plus `ndim`
translations in 2-D, or three axis-angle rotations plus
`ndim` translations in 3-D.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Rigid.exp -->
```python
exp(params: Float[Array, '... p'], *, ndim: int) -> Float[Array, '... d1 d1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Closed-form rigid exponential map via [`rigid_exp`](../nitrix-geometry-transform/rigid_exp.qmd),
returning the homogeneous
$(\text{ndim} + 1, \text{ndim} + 1)$ transform.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Rigid.rescale_to_grid -->
```python
rescale_to_grid(params: Float[Array, ' p'], ratio: Float[Array, ' d']) -> Float[Array, ' p']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Rescale to a finer grid by scaling the trailing translation
block by `ratio`; the rotation parameters are grid-invariant
and left unchanged.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Rigid.__init__ -->
```python
__init__() -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:Rigid -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
